methodology.lead: Every recommendation published on withSahib passes through six sequential filters. A setup that fails any single filter is discarded — regardless of how compelling it looks on the surface.
methodology.process_sub: Each filter runs sequentially. A setup that fails Filter 2 never reaches Filter 3.
methodology.philosophy_title: The one rule that overrides all others.
methodology.quote: Most analysts ask: why should I take this trade? I ask: is there any reason not to. If one filter fails — it is out. Not reconsidered. Not adjusted. Out.

about.name: Sahib Singh Hora
about.bio: I built withSahib to bring institutional-grade equity research to every serious market participant in India. Every recommendation I publish carries my SEBI registration number, my name, and my reasoning. That accountability is the foundation of everything here.

services.headline: Research built for
services.intraday_desc: Daily pre-market equity research for NSE stocks. Entry zone, two targets, stop-loss and written rationale — delivered before 9 AM.

services.index_desc: Nifty, BankNifty, Sensex and FinNifty. Expiry plays and weekly setups with PCR and OI context.
services.swing_desc: 8–12 high-conviction positional setups per month. Low risk, asymmetric reward.

faq.headline: Frequently asked
faq.a1: Yes. Sahib Singh Hora is a SEBI Registered Research Analyst with registration number INH000026266.
faq.q2: How many research notes are published per day?
faq.a2: 1–3 research notes on most trading days. If no setup passes all six filters, nothing is published that day.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a3: Yes. All subscriptions can be cancelled anytime with no lock-in period.
faq.a4: The Flagship Mentorship is a complete 3-month personalised 1-on-1 mentorship with Sahib Singh Hora. Only one mentee per batch.
faq.q5: How do I verify the SEBI registration?
faq.a5: Visit sebi.gov.in and search for registration number INH000026266.
